scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run dev -w @ralph-ui/backend" "npm run dev -w @ralph-ui/frontend"
scripts.dev:watch: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run dev:watch -w @ralph-ui/backend" "npm run dev -w @ralph-ui/frontend"
scripts.quality:quick: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test
scripts.quality: npm run quality:quick && npm run test:coverage && npm run complexity && npm run duplication
